feedback.name: 2026-06-22-top-level-change-id-cleanup
feedback.description: Rooted out stale `.peaks/2026-06-22-cc-connect-orphan-cleanup/` (4 files, 28K, untracked) that violated the 2.8.0+ two-axis convention. Added defensive `.peaks/[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]-[0-9][0-9]-[0-9][0-9]-*/` rule to root `.gitignore` + 5-case vitest guard at `tests/unit/workspace/top-level-change-id-guard.test.ts`. Audit confirmed no other top-level date-prefixed `.peaks/` siblings exist. `.peaks/_runtime/<sid>/` paths are unaffected (rule is path-anchored at the `.peaks/<seg>/` segment). Memory record + index update retained at `.peaks/memory/2026-06-22-top-level-change-id-cleanup.md`.

feedback.name: 2026-06-22-cc-connect-removal-publish
feedback.description: peaks-cli 2.8.2 publish day: cc-connect removal + 4-fix audit cleanup finally shipped to npm as latest. Originally committed locally as 4c845d9 but never published; 2.8.1 stayed as npm latest throughout the day. Lessons: (1) verify npm state before versioning, (2) git add <explicit-list> silently skips deletions (qrcode-terminal.d.ts missed in initial stat, caught by self-audit and amended). peaks-companion skill is intentional tombstone per CHANGELOG.md:53-55. Final: 797 files, 999.9 kB tarball, integrity sha512-Yhg9epDO0/...

feedback.name: 2026-06-16-six-issue-user-feedback-batch
feedback.description: 6 user-reported issues from real Claude Code usage → 6 PRDs (rules-write-path, fact-forcing-gate-format, hook-governance, peaks-rd-no-gates, playwright-restart-loop, cli-logging) + 1 follow-up PRD (peaks-solo-auto-scaffold). All shipped to develop @ 914e9ef on 2026-06-16. Lessons: (1) realpath-guard false-positive caught ONLY by dogfood, not by 3 QA cycles (synthetic fixtures missed subdir-of-home case); (2) CORRECTED 2026-06-17: [Fact-Forcing Gate] text comes from ECC (everything-claude-code) v1.10.0's gateguard-fact-force.js hook, not peaks-cli and not Claude Code. ECC upstream PR #1531 fixes it. User needs `git cherry-pick 3d30936` on their local ECC clone; (3) peaks-cli vs consumer project integration gap addressed by PRD#7 auto-scaffold. Followups: PRD#8 (stale dist regression test, shipped), PRD#9 (workspace-commands split, shipped).

feedback.name: peaks-companion-qr-autoopen-2026-06-15
feedback.description: peaks companion setup now auto-pops the QR PNG in macOS Preview / Windows Photos / Linux xdg-open. Replaces the manual file-open step. The Claude Code chat inline-image path was abandoned (chat does not render any external images). Path B (manual token) remains no-image-required.

feedback.name: peaks-companion-qr-inline-display-2026-06-15
feedback.description: peaks companion setup QR now renders inline in markdown surfaces (Claude Code chat, GitHub PR) via auto-detected renderer. Default TTY = unicodeBlockQrRenderer (█▀▄); Claude Code env or --qr-inline = inlineQrRenderer (base64 PNG markdown); --qr-ascii = legacy qrcode-terminal. Flag precedence: --qr-inline > --qr-ascii > CLAUDE_CODE env > default. Path B (--token) bypasses renderer.

feedback.name: peaks-companion-cc-connect-dogfood-2026-06-15
feedback.description: iLink 通道 dogfood (rid=2026-06-14-cc-connect-weixin)：path A (QR 扫码) 在 iLink 服务侧不稳定时跑不通；path B (手动 token 注入, peaks companion token <bearer>) 是新装用户兜底；ASCII QR 在 chat 客户端无法扫；iLink bearer token 寿命 >2h；`pairing: unknown` 是 cosmetic drift。
